description_long: This object is a stylized sandwich composed of two thick, square slices of brown bread, enclosing layers of green lettuce, a slice of red tomato, and a pale yellow cheese or meat. The bread appears to be slightly oversized compared to the fillings, with the ingredients peeking out unevenly from the sides. The sandwich has a blocky, low-polygon appearance, giving it a cartoonish or simplified look. The fillings are visible from all sides, with the green lettuce being the most prominent, followed by hints of tomato and cheese. There is no visible packaging or branding on the sandwich. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, hand-assembled sandwich suitable for casual urban dining or a picnic.
description: A blocky, stylized sandwich with brown bread, green lettuce, red tomato, and pale cheese or meat peeking out from the sides. The sandwich has a cartoonish, low-polygon look and no visible packaging.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sandwich with green lettuce and a hint of red tomato and cheese visible between thick brown bread slices.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the green lettuce and pale cheese or meat layer, with the bread's thickness and blocky corners more apparent.
description_view_2: Back view displays mostly the bread and a small amount of lettuce and cheese, with less tomato visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the protruding lettuce and cheese, with the bread's angular edges clearly visible.
